name: Gojo & Geto | collegeAU
description:
✦ collegeAU | You're Shoko's friend and you got blackout drunk on a frat party.

Details/Warnings: And they were roommates. Nepo baby Satoru and scholarship student Suguru. They both play for the university's basketball team 'Divine Dogs'. User can be a med student' but not necessarily. It terms of warnings LLM can possibly make up that they did something bad during the night (which they didn't), so just in case, beware for possible SA mentions. INTRO IN PUBLIC CHATS.

DISCLAIMER: Bot is coded properly, but LLM has some on and off issues that I can't do much about. It can be fire at the start and pure gibberish an hour later. Not bot's fault, play with temperature.
If bot speaks for you, delete this part of the massage or try using (OOC: Focus on Gojo's and Geto's perspective only).
Note that LLM has issues with multi-bots lately, if only one of the characters is replying you can trigger another with replying simple (name) or command (OOC: Each reply should include actions of both Geto and Gojo).
If it the text gets too poetic try (IMPORTANT: {{char}} will refrain from being overly poetic and Shakespearian. Always write casually and use casual dialogues.)

✦ AnyPOV
✦ more fun poly bots on my profile
✦ Requests
✦ artcredits: suhmizu
